ogTitle: Callignee South vs Calulu: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Callignee South and Calulu.
heading: Callignee South vs Calulu — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Callignee South, Victoria and Calulu, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Calulu has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Callignee South (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Callignee South or Calulu safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Callignee South has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Calulu scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Callignee South scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Calulu scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Callignee South or Calulu?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Calulu has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
